name: enhancement-hooks
question: What enhancement hooks will the domain need?
decision: enhanceModels: Organization.ownerCount, Team.memberCount, Invitation.isExpired; enhanceCollections: OrganizationMember.findByUserId, TeamMember.findByUserId, Permission.findForUser; enhanceRootStore: currentOrganization (volatile), switchOrganization, resolvePermission, initialize
rationale: All hooks implemented in single teams/domain.ts using createStoreFromScope(). Spec skill creates ONE 'Domain Store' task. resolvePermission implements additive inheritance chain.
